question: What is the position of the woman in relation to the man? Select from the following options: (A) They are next to each other. (B) The woman is behind the man. (C) The woman is in front of the man. (D) The woman is not visible in the image.
gold_answer: The woman is in front of the man
answer_choices: They are next to each other
The woman is behind the man
The woman is in front of the man
The woman is not visible in the image

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A woman standing in front of the man, wearing a long dress and holding a hat.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: The blacked-out region is empty or contains only shadows, no person visible.
